species: A point mutation in the kinase domain of CRK10 leads to xylem vessel collapse and activation of defence responses in Arabidopsis
tissue: the transcriptome of hypocotyls isolated from 2-, 3- and 5-week-old WT and mutant plants.
cell_type: the collapsed xylem vessels displayed darker brown staining in response to the dye compared with their WT counterparts...
disease_state: we chose the vascular pathogen Fusarium oxysporum f. sp. conglutinans 699, an isolate known to infect Arabidopsis, for the assay.
sample_source: Total RNA was extracted from hypocotyls of Arabidopsis plants using the RNeasy Mini Kit (Qiagen).
age: the transcriptome of hypocotyls isolated from 2-, 3- and 5-week-old WT and mutant plants.
